pages.title: Solar Battery Storage Systems for Homeowners | SunPower®
pages.description: With battery backup and non-backup options available, SunPower makes it easy to add energy storage to any home. Learn more about the benefits of adding solar battery storage to your home power system.
pages.content:
![](https://images.ctfassets.net/k6ot5nj1c6f9/3hBWGs9hcOzsxrZytR0MrO/be7391f6c809159506e63f82aa168b64/Solar_battery_storage.jpg?fm=webp&w=1920)

# Energy Management Solutions

[Get Started](https://us.sunpower.com/get-started)

## Save More with Intelligent Energy Control

The future of energy is here. Advanced battery storage solutions go beyond electricity storage. When combined with a solar system, it’s an intelligent system that gives you unprecedented control over how you store and use electricity.

- ![Bullet Icon](https://images.ctfassets.net/k6ot5nj1c6f9/4sxx0bpsg0XenVVvUwddr0/317cdf4fc5c76404eb6094503a8fa861/Bullet-Icon.svg)


Capture and store excess solar energy

- ![Bullet Icon](https://images.ctfassets.net/k6ot5nj1c6f9/4sxx0bpsg0XenVVvUwddr0/317cdf4fc5c76404eb6094503a8fa861/Bullet-Icon.svg)


Optimize energy consumption

- ![Bullet Icon](https://images.ctfassets.net/k6ot5nj1c6f9/4sxx0bpsg0XenVVvUwddr0/317cdf4fc5c76404eb6094503a8fa861/Bullet-Icon.svg)


Reduce electricity bills


![Smaller, Smarter, and More Efficient](https://images.ctfassets.net/k6ot5nj1c6f9/2tIh1QJiQnQJE7cG38oyDU/c8c5dc898a52f88317eeb9dc46d03b00/smaller-smarter-and-more-efficient.png?fm=webp&h=600)

## Smaller, Smarter, and More Efficient

The equation is simple: maximize your home's solar energy usage to minimize grid electricity purchases. Our Enphase 10C battery and solar options help you capture and store excess solar energy, allowing you to use power when utility rates are highest, giving you control and savings on your electric bill.

![Long-Lasting Peace of Mind](https://images.ctfassets.net/k6ot5nj1c6f9/5JxUzPV40QcV0OsAt4NFia/7d12c6d6560f3b6ad456a32bccd641b9/long-lasting-peace-of-mind.png?fm=webp&h=600)

## Long-Lasting Peace of Mind

[With a 15-year limited warranty](https://enphase.com/sites/default/files/2021-02/IQ-Battery-Limited-Warranty-EN-US-Effective-January-31-2021.pdf), our energy management solution provides confidence and longevity. This isn't just a battery—it's your personal energy guardian.

### Interested in the new Enphase 10C Battery for your home?

Talk to a SunPower expert today to find out how it can help you potentially [maximize your solar savings.](https://enphase.com/blog/homeowners/solar-battery-cost-worth-investment)

[Learn More](https://us.sunpower.com/get-started)

![Your Energy. Your Control. Your Future.](https://images.ctfassets.net/k6ot5nj1c6f9/3F94crRkXDdITRQAiJMGvo/61136b515af941d58abf2c7dddaebe8e/Your_Energy._Your_Control._Your_Future..png?fm=webp&h=600)

## Your Energy. Your Control. Your Future.

Reimagine how you interact with energy. Our solution transforms solar from a daytime solution into an all-day, all-night power strategy.

Schedule your free consultation today and let our solar experts be your guide in choosing a solar battery system that will work best for you.

[Get Started](https://us.sunpower.com/home-solar/solar-battery-storage#get-started-form-6kIue)

![Intelligent Energy Capture and Control](https://images.ctfassets.net/k6ot5nj1c6f9/3pW71tZkeIipH7OjpDS0rh/c0189cac6f6c92899702ceb31402b1d8/Intelligent_Energy_Capture_and_Control.png?fm=webp&h=600)

## Intelligent Energy Capture and Control

As your solar system converts the sun’s power into energy during the day, excess power is stored in your energy management system. Depending on your goals, stored electricity can optimize your home’s energy usage, can reduce electricity costs, or provide resilient power during outages.

![Take Control of Your Energy Future](https://images.ctfassets.net/k6ot5nj1c6f9/1KLe2IJoVwj5KgPeE3L0I5/c1a566641180a43b8e3f8981e58270a8/Take_Control_of_Your_Energy_Future.png?fm=webp&h=600)

## Take Control of Your Energy Future

Utility companies charge premium rates during peak demand. Our intelligent energy management system empowers you to store clean, solar energy and strategically use it when rates are highest, transforming your home's power consumption and saving money on your electric bill.

![Maximize Your Energy Value](https://images.ctfassets.net/k6ot5nj1c6f9/1L72AksMUz54Jxzm8omz8C/2e9d2323e61c8770f774acab8335b181/maximize-your-energy-value.png?fm=webp&h=600)

## Maximize Your Energy Value

When integrated with your customized solar panel system, our intelligent energy management solution amplifies your electricity bill savings beyond traditional solar. As grid electricity rates climb, you'll gain long-lasting financial peace of mind, knowing you've made a strategic investment in your home's energy future.

![](https://images.ctfassets.net/k6ot5nj1c6f9/HqcKnJJyfYkm1k659g24a/dd4168746122d7d00ff34b16f5cdc297/Solar_battery_storage_Enphase_Energy_Management_System_Without_Backup.jpg?fm=webp&w=1920)

## Enphase Energy Management System Without Backup

Ideal for homeowners with limited net energy metering (NEM) programs, our energy management solution seamlessly integrates with your solar system to optimize energy use and help reduce\* electricity costs.

Quality assured, this system helps you minimize carbon emissions and maximize your energy savings by intelligently storing and strategically using solar power during peak rate times.

![Lower Your Electricity Bills: Energy Optimization Without Backup](https://images.ctfassets.net/k6ot5nj1c6f9/32NEwYfBBmckNZ6yuevOY8/0075a217ba50ff1f73d4b3073c442f8c/lower-your-electricity-bills-energy-optimization-without-backup.png?fm=webp&h=600)

## Lower Your Electricity Bills

Maximize your home’s solar energy usage to minimize grid electricity purchases. A solar battery, like the Enphase 10C, captures and stores excess solar energy, allowing you to use it when needed—especially during [peak utility rate times](https://www.energysage.com/electricity/whats-the-cheapest-time-of-day-to-use-electricity-with-time-of-use-rates/). By using stored energy, you can optimize your electric bill and take control of your energy costs.

[Get Started](https://us.sunpower.com/home-solar/solar-battery-storage#get-started-form-6kIue)

![cycle night to day](https://us.sunpower.com/img/cycles/Cycle_Night-to-Day.webp)

Get a Quote

## Frequently Asked Questions

## About Solar Battery Storage

#### What Is NEM 3.0 and How Does Solar Battery Storage Factor In?

[NEM 3.0 is California’s updated solar net metering policy](https://www.cpuc.ca.gov/industries-and-topics/electrical-energy/demand-side-management/net-energy-metering), effective April 2023, for PG&E, SCE, and SDG&E customers. Under NEM 3.0, the compensation solar customers receive for exporting excess electricity back to the grid varies based on the time of day, day of the week, and month. On average, these rates are about 75% lower than those under the previous NEM 2.0 policy.

Solar batteries help homeowners adapt to [NEM 3.0](https://www.energysage.com/blog/net-metering-3-0/) by allowing them to store excess solar energy instead of sending it to the grid at reduced rates. This stored energy can then be used during peak pricing hours or when solar production is low, maximizing the value of your system and reducing dependence on the utility grid.

#### What is included in the Enphase Battery System without Backup?

The Enphase battery system has two main components: the IQ Combiner and the IQ Enphase Battery. It is also paired with the [Enphase Enlighten monitoring app](https://enphase.com/homeowners/enphase-app), available on both mobile and web platforms.

#### Is there a warranty?

The warranty for the Enphase Battery System without backup is provided directly by the manufacturer. Enphase IQ 10C batteries come with a limited 15-year warranty. Warranty coverage for other components may vary. Visit the [Enphase Warranty page for more information.](https://enphase.com/sites/default/files/2021-02/IQ-Battery-Limited-Warranty-EN-US-Effective-January-31-2021.pdf)

### Have additional questions? Check out our FAQs to learn more.

[Learn More](https://us.sunpower.com/acquisition-announcement)
